title: epilobium tetragonum nothosubsp. semiadnatum
intro: Epilobium tetragonum nothosubsp. semiadnatum, also known as the river beauty or four-angled willowherb, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the willowherb family (Onagraceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, making it beneficial for treating various health conditions such as urinary tract issues, digestive problems, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Epilobium tetragonum nothosubsp. semiadnatum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve kidney function, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat conditions such as benign prostatic hyperplasia and cystitis.
